subcodes.first_line: Praise, sanctified above all mention and utterance, befitteth and beseemeth the Lord of all possibility, Who through His consummate power and conquering might [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ذکر و بیان مالک امکان را لایق و سزاست که بقدرت کامله و قوت قاهره
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @praise and encouragement, @banishment to; life in 'Akka, @power of the Manifestation of God, @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
